landing.title: SQL VIBE – Learn MySQL: Practice, Experiment, Understand
landing.description: Interactive MySQL learning platform with exercises, a free sandbox for your own databases, and a theory hub for normalization, RM, ERM, and SQL fundamentals.
landing.headline: Learn SQL — practice, experiment, understand
landing.subheadline: Interactive exercises, a free sandbox for your own databases, and a learning hub for normalization, RM & ERM — all right in your browser, no sign-up required.
landing.sectionSubtitle: Targeted exercises, exciting story missions, free experimentation, or theory tutoring
landing.practiceDescription: Interactive exercises with instant feedback, hints, and gamified progress. From SELECT basics to interview challenges.
landing.storyDescription: Solve exciting SQL crime cases and missions with increasing difficulty. Narrative adventures where every query counts.
landing.sandboxDescription: Create your own databases, set up tables, insert data, and run any SQL queries. Everything is saved locally.
landing.learnDescription: Theory hub: normalization, relational model, ERM, SQL fundamentals, and more. With interactive diagrams and embedded examples.

footer.brandSlogan: Learn SQL interactively — from beginner to pro.

sandbox.title: Sandbox – Create Your Own SQL Database
sandbox.description: Create your own MySQL databases, set up tables, insert data, and run any SQL queries. Everything is stored locally in your browser.
sandbox.fileTooLarge: File too large ({size} MB). Maximum 5 MB.
sandbox.noDatabaseHint: Create or open a database to run SQL queries.
sandbox.mobileDescription: The sandbox requires a larger screen for the SQL editor and result display. Please use a desktop browser or resize your window.

streak_3.name: On Track
streak_3.description: 3 days of learning in a row

level_10.name: Query Master
level_10.description: Reached level 10 — you're a SQL pro

errors.syntax: There is a syntax error in your query. Check that all keywords are spelled correctly and all parentheses are closed.
errors.missingTable: The table does not exist. Check the table name for typos.
errors.missingColumn: The column does not exist. Check the column name for typos.
errors.datatypeMismatch: The data types are not compatible. Check that you are comparing strings and numbers correctly.
errors.unknown: An unknown error occurred. Try simplifying the query and testing step by step.

lektionen.metaDescription: Learn MySQL step by step with interactive exercises: SELECT, WHERE, JOINs, aggregations, subqueries, CTEs, window functions, and more.
lektionen.title: SQL Lessons
lektionen.subtitle: Learn MySQL step by step. Choose a lesson to start with interactive exercises.
